values.value: Flags successful logins from a country that is not present in the user's warmed-up baseline Country_Set__c. A new login country for a user with established travel patterns is a strong indicator of credential reuse, session hijacking, or unannounced travel that should be verified out-of-band.

Contact the user out-of-band (phone, established chat) to verify travel. If the login was not theirs, expire all active sessions, reset the password, and reset MFA factors. Review LoginHistory and OauthToken records around the time of the login for further compromise.
